name: Broccoli Italian Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the broccoli florets and trim any tough stems from the stalks.
2. Put the broccoli leaves in boiling water with salt. Cook for about a minute.
3. Add the flowerets to the pan of boiling water. Return to a boil and cook for 6 to 8 minutes until tender but resistant to biting.
4. Drain.
5. Heat the olive oil in a pan and add garlic. Cook over moderate heat for about one minute.
6. Add the broccoli leaves and flowerets. Toss with the garlic oil for about two minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper, then sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese to taste.
